original_input:
Hi Sir,

Innaiku morning la irundhu assigned task mela work pannitu iruken. Initial analysis complete panniten, and current implementation almost 70% mudinjudhu. Development process la sila edge cases identify panniruken, adhanala code-a konjam refactor panna vendiyadhu irundhadhu.

Ippo varaikkum core functionality ellam expected madhiri work aagudhu. Aana final integration testing panna appo sila minor issues vandhuchu. Adha investigate pannitu iruken. Enakku therinja varaikkum adhu major blocker illa, so innaiku EOD-kulla fix pannidalaam nu nenaikuren.

Documentation-um parallel-a update pannitu iruken so later handover or review time la easy-a irukkum. Naalaiku morning-kulla complete testing mudichitu final build share panna try panren.

Edhachum additional requirement irundha illa priority change panna sollanum na please let me know. Adhuku according-a work plan adjust pannikuren.

Thanks Sir.
vaani_output:
Hi Sir,

I've been working on the assigned task since this morning. I've completed the initial analysis and have made significant progress on the implementation, with about 70% of the work done. During the development process, I identified a few edge cases, which required some code refactoring.

So far, the core functionality is working as expected. However, I've encountered some minor issues during the final integration testing, which I'm currently investigating. Based on my assessment, these issues don't seem to be major blockers, and I'm confident that I can resolve them by the end of the day.

I'm also updating the documentation in parallel, which will make it easier for handovers or reviews later on. I'm aiming to complete the testing by tomorrow morning and share the final build.

If there are any additional requirements or changes in priority, please let me know as soon as possible, so I can adjust the work plan accordingly.

Thanks Sir.
